bindings.title: @zoink: Everything you saw today: code, motion, shaders, your own tools... It all lives together...
bindings.excerpt: Everything you saw today: code, motion, shaders, your own tools... It all lives together in the canvas. For the first time, in one place. Today we announced ways to: → explore with code → generate with Weave → build plugins and shaders with the Figma agent → animate with Figma Motion

bindings.title: The Gallery Collection
bindings.excerpt: Welcome to The Gallery, where we curate a modest women’s collection that is considered & diverse. From essentials to couture pieces inspired by Parisian wardrobe: a mélange of buttoned-up classics, breezy bohemian, monochromatic minimalism, & more.
bindings.source_summary: Welcome to The Gallery, where we curate a modest women’s collection that is considered & diverse. From essentials to couture pieces inspired by Parisian wardrobe: a mélange of buttoned-up classics, breezy bohemian, monochromatic minimalism, & more.
